about.title: About the parking block
about.subtitle: Take care of the security of your parking spot.
about.body1: Powder-coated parking blocks are resistant to corrosion and weather. They protect a parking spot from being taken by unauthorised people.
about.body2: We offer blocks in several types - U, M and the folding Butterfly. Each block is mounted permanently, and the key stays only with the owner.
